title: peltopus aechmophorus
intro: Peltopus aechmophorus, also known as the Red-flowered Peltopus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and fever, due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Peltopus aechmophorus include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant involve making infusions or decoctions from the leaves or flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
